text: During robot-assisted laparoscopic surgery, the surgeon demonstrates a novel knot-tying technique. The left needle driver grasps the right suture tail and overlays it on the left tail to form a loop. The right needle driver passes through the loop to grasp the right tail, while the left needle driver releases it and grasps the left suture. Both sutures are pulled apart to tighten the knot, with the technique repeated using alternating threads.
